title: Crisp Tunisian Fish Ceviche
description: A winey, matcha‑infused ceviche that feels like a lazy Sunday lunch, served in a quick parchment papillote for a crisp finish.
instructions: Slice the fish into 1 cm cubes and place them in a glass bowl.
Pour the white wine over the fish and let it chill for 5 minutes in the fridge.
Whisk the matcha powder with lemon and lime juices until smooth.
Add cumin, paprika, olive oil and the citrus‑matcha mixture to the fish and gently toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for an additional 10 minutes to cure the flavors.
Finely chop cilantro and parsley for garnish.
Arrange the marinated fish on parchment paper, fold into a papillote shape, and warm in a 200C oven for 3 minutes.
Serve the crisp ceviche immediately, sprinkled with fresh herbs and a drizzle of olive oil.
